description: Creates Entra ID named locations for trusted IPs and geo-blocking. Named locations are referenced by Conditional Access policies to enforce network-based access controls, OFAC compliance, and high-risk country blocking.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Trusted IP location created. OFAC geo-blocking enabled. High-risk country blocking disabled.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Trusted IP location created. OFAC geo-blocking enabled. High-risk country blocking enabled (RU, CN, BY, VE, MM).
risk_profile_effects.strict: Trusted IP location created. OFAC geo-blocking enabled. High-risk country blocking enabled. Allowlist geo mode available.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls whether high-risk country blocking is enabled and the geo-blocking mode.

trusted_cidrs.label: Trusted IP CIDRs
trusted_cidrs.client_description: Your office and VPN IP address ranges in CIDR notation. Sign-ins from these networks are considered trusted and can be used to relax MFA requirements or restrict service account access.

ofac_countries.label: OFAC Sanctioned Countries
ofac_countries.client_description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes for OFAC-sanctioned nations. Authentication from these countries is always blocked. Default: North Korea, Iran, Cuba, Syria.

enable_high_risk_blocking.label: Enable High-Risk Country Blocking
enable_high_risk_blocking.client_description: Block authentication from countries with elevated cyber threat profiles. Enabled by default for Elevated and Strict profiles.

high_risk_countries.label: High-Risk Countries
high_risk_countries.client_description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes for high-risk countries. Only used when high-risk blocking is enabled.

geo_mode.label: Geo-Blocking Mode
geo_mode.client_description: Controls how geographic restrictions work. 'blocklist' blocks specific countries. 'allowlist' only allows countries you explicitly approve (strict mode default).

allowlist_countries.label: Allowlist Countries
allowlist_countries.client_description: Countries to allow in allowlist (strict) mode. Only used when geo_mode is 'allowlist'. Include all countries where your employees and contractors work.

outputs.trusted_location_id: Named location ID for trusted networks
outputs.ofac_location_id: Named location ID for OFAC blocklist
outputs.high_risk_location_id: Named location ID for high-risk country blocklist (null if disabled)
